# Loader

A loading indicator component that provides inline loading states and full-screen or container overlay loading states.

## Import

```jsx
import { Loader, LoaderOverlay } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Components

**Loader** -- Wraps `Loader.Root` from Chakra UI. Displays an inline loading indicator with optional text.

**LoaderOverlay** -- Wraps `Loader.Overlay` from Chakra UI. Renders a full-screen or container overlay for loading states. Must be used inside a container with `position="relative"`.

## Loader Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `visible` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the loader is visible. |
| `text` | `ReactNode` | - | The text to display alongside the spinner. |
| `spinner` | `ReactNode` | - | Custom spinner element to display when loading. |
| `spinnerPlacement` | `"start" \| "end"` | `"start"` | The placement of the spinner relative to the text. |

## Usage

### Basic Loader

```jsx
<Loader text="Loading..." />
```

### Loader with Visibility Toggle

```jsx
<Loader visible={isLoading} text="Loading..." />
```

### Overlay Loading State

Use `LoaderOverlay` inside a relatively-positioned container to cover its content with a loading indicator.

```jsx
<Box position="relative" p="6" bg="bg.panel" rounded="l3">
  <Stack gap="4">
    <Field.Root>
      <Field.Label>First name</Field.Label>
      <Input />
    </Field.Root>
    <Button>Submit</Button>
  </Stack>
  {isLoading && (
    <LoaderOverlay bg="bg/80" rounded="l3">
      <Loader textStyle="sm" fontWeight="medium" text="Loading..." />
    </LoaderOverlay>
  )}
</Box>
```
